completed_tasks.name: Bump agent GitHub client ID to Dev Tunnels App (D-4)
Human-verify: live GitHub-auth end-to-end smoke walk
completed_tasks.progress: GitHub sign-in works; picker lists tunnels (after list-decode fix); agent authenticates, registers, and hosts. 5 real-API bugs found & fixed live. Pending: user restarts app to pick up the tags-field fix, confirms picker lists the tunnel, then tests CONNECT (get_access_token endpoint shape still unverified).

remaining_tasks.name: Confirm picker lists silent-book-tphgwm9 after app restart, then connect -> [remote] tab -> type in remote shell; complete 09.2-SMOKE.md sign-off

blockers.description: Connect path (get_access_token, POST /api/v1/tunnels/{id}/access?scopes=connect, expects {token:...}) is unverified against the real API -- may have a shape mismatch like the list endpoint did
blockers.workaround: If connect throws 'error decoding response body', apply the same fix pattern: probe the real response with the cached token via curl, then correct the model/decode

human_actions_pending.action: Restart Vector app (cargo run -p vector-app), sign in with GitHub, open picker (Cmd-Shift-T)
human_actions_pending.context: tags-field fix 4f1882e is app-side; running app is stale

human_actions_pending.action: Confirm picker lists tunnel 'silent-book-tphgwm9', select it, connect, type a command in the [remote] tab
git push (user pushes asynchronously per CLAUDE.md) -- 13 commits this session are local-only on master

decisions.decision: Dev Tunnels list endpoint returns a bare JSON array, not {value:[...]}
decisions.rationale: verified live: empty account returns [] with 200

decisions.decision: Agent device-flow polls must wait interval before the first poll (RFC 8628 3.4) and treat incorrect_device_code as transient
decisions.rationale: immediate poll races GitHub code propagation -> intermittent incorrect_device_code

decisions.decision: Agent must NOT set a custom tunnel name (relay 403 'custom tunnel names disabled'); identify by label only
decisions.rationale: feature disabled for this account; auto-assigned id is used

decisions.decision: vector-agent label lives under the relay's tags field; both agent and picker use the plain string 'vector-agent'
decisions.rationale: API returns tags not labels; 'vector-agent: true' was never a valid label (colon/space)

decisions.decision: Unified agent .deb + app .dmg into a single release.yml; retired agent-release.yml (quick task 260529-hni)
decisions.rationale: one v* tag should produce both artifacts on one Release

uncommitted_files: .planning/ (commit_docs=false -- planning docs incl. this handoff and 09.2 SUMMARYs are intentionally uncommitted; user commits .planning on their cadence)

background_processes.name: vector-tunnel-agent
background_processes.state: RUNNING and hosting (under a backgrounded Bash task)
background_processes.note: token cached at ~/.config/vector/agent-token; re-run with `cargo run -p vector-tunnel-agent` if it stopped (no re-auth needed while token valid, ~8h)

next_action: Restart the Vector app, confirm the picker lists 'silent-book-tphgwm9', then test connect. If connect errors with a decode/HTTP failure, probe get_access_token's real response (cached github token via curl) and fix the model the same way as the list/tags bugs.
context_notes: Phase 09.2 swapped Dev Tunnels sign-in from Microsoft to GitHub (plans 01-03 complete). Plan 04 is the live smoke gate. This session ran the smoke walk and fixed a cascade of fixture-vs-reality bugs in code paths that had never run against the live API (Phase 9 UAT died at Microsoft auth before reaching them). Each fix used TDD: probe real API -> failing test -> fix -> green. Also did out-of-band work: CI remediation (4 commits: ci.yml codespaces step, arch-lint test files, machete unused deps, deny policy) after Phases 5-9.2 were pushed to master for the first time since Phase 4, and a quick task unifying the release workflow. All code is committed to master locally; NOT pushed. The connect leg is the only remaining smoke step.
